Mapping Rationale: This section permits emergency search and seizure by an inspector. Maps to P7-I5 because it authorizes access to personal data/property without prior independent judicial authorization when urgency makes a warrant unnecessary.
Notes: Discovery: instrument is known but s. 545 is not among its recorded provisions (['10', '110', '317ZH', '65', '8BG']). Modality: may; exceptions: If the seriousness and urgency threshold is not met, the powers are exercised only with authority of a warrant issued under Division 3.
